seeds.label: Union Square to McCarren
seeds.description: Recorded crash and injury observations along a bike route.
seeds.missionText: Bike from Union Square to McCarren Park and show the route's historical crash observations.

seeds.label: Village walking corridor
seeds.description: Inspect recorded crashes on a walking route.
seeds.missionText: Walk from Washington Square Park to Union Square and inspect recorded crashes.

seeds.label: Brooklyn bike corridor
seeds.description: Route with historical street observations included in cost.
seeds.missionText: Bike from Cooper Park to McCarren Park using historical street observations.

seeds.label: East Village injuries
seeds.description: Inspect recorded injuries along a walking route.
seeds.missionText: Walk from Tompkins Square Park to Union Square and show recorded injuries.
